title: alisma major
intro: Alisma major, also known as the water plantain or mad dog tongue, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Asia and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Alisma major include reducing swelling and pain, treating urinary tract infections, and lowering blood pressure. Alisma major can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
